/usr/bin/clang++ -O1 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -gline-tables-only -DFUZZING_BUILD_MODE_UNSAFE_FOR_PRODUCTION -fsanitize=address -fsanitize-address-use-after-scope -fsanitize=fuzzer-no-link -stdlib=libstdc++ -Wall -Wextra -fno-omit-frame-pointer -Wno-microsoft-anon-tag   CMakeFiles/nngcat.dir/nngcat.c.o -o nngcat  -Wl,-rpath,:::::::::::::: ../../../libnng.a -lnsl -latomic /usr/local/lib/libparquet.a /usr/local/lib/libarrow.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbrotlienc.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbrotlidec.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbrotlicommon.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbz2.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/liblz4.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsnappy.so.1.1.8 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libzstd.so -lrt /usr/local/lib/libthriftd.a -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
